name: @digitaloutbreak/workflow-init
description: Drop-in workflow scaffold for AI-assisted coding — works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, Cline, Windsurf, and any agent loading the open agent skills standard. Includes /workflow-init slash command, /feature lifecycle, /cleanup, code-scanner agent, and tool-specific root files (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md).
author: Joey Alvarado <joeynalvarado@gmail.com>
